title: Nazir2608/my-own-ai
summary: Built own local AI app with Spring Boot + Ollama + Vector Search + RAG. Learn embeddings, semantic search, HNSW, and LLM integration with a fully local AI system.

title: mscbuild/ai-agent
summary: AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.  100% free and Opensource.  It showcases practical applications and provides links to open-source projects for implementation, illustrating how AI agents are transforming sectors such as healthcare, finance, education and more.

title: UpayanGhosh/Synapse-OSS
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant with hybrid memory, evolving personality, and multi-channel support (WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack)

title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: Visual Builder for AI Workflows and Agents

title: drissiOmar98/Spring-AI-Integration
summary: A curated collection of Spring Boot projects demonstrating AI and LLM integrations, including examples of AI-powered applications, multi-provider LLM setups, and best practices for Spring AI, modular design, and integration testing.

title: elemsi/forecastgpt-financial-outlook-agent
summary: 📊 Automate financial analysis and forecasting with ForecastGPT, leveraging AI to extract insights from reports and streamline decision-making.

title: dannyyol/cvrise
summary: Build ATS Friendly Resume and Cover Letter

title: kubawer21/StealthIt
summary: 🛠️ Enhance productivity with StealthIt, a hidden AI utility for screen analysis and voice interaction, ensuring efficiency without detection.

title: openboek-io/openboek
summary: Self-hosted bookkeeping for Dutch small businesses. Privacy-first, AI-powered, open source.

title: kjgdgch65g/nl-rag-qdrant-legal
summary: 📄 Explore Retrieval-Augmented Generation for legal document Q&A, leveraging QDrant and Ollama AI models with C# and .NET 9.0.

title: michaelalber/grounded-code-mcp
summary: LLMs are sophisticated pattern matchers, not reasoning engines. This project mitigates known failure modes (hallucination, brittle compositionality, lack of grounding) by anchoring AI coding assistants to vetted, authoritative documentation via RAG.

title: ParisNeo/lollms_hub
summary: A proxy server for multiple ollama instances with Key security

title: barelvi67/gannicus
summary: 🏛️ Generate realistic synthetic data for TypeScript with Gannicus, a powerful library that leverages AI for efficient and coherent data creation.

title: pepoanas/llm-vuln-scanner
summary: 🔍 Enhance local LLM security by testing for vulnerabilities like prompt injection, model inversion, and data leakage with this robust toolkit.

title: Jkaotlic/ollama-subtitle-translator
summary: Offline subtitle translator with 2026 LLMs (Gemma 4, Qwen 3.5, Hunyuan-MT, Llama 4 Scout) via Ollama. Web UI + CLI, 17 languages, video subtitle extraction, persistent Translation Memory, LLM-as-judge quality estimation, genre-aware prompts. No API keys, no cloud.

title: mmonteleone/corral
summary: Ollama-shaped llama.cpp, MLX, and model management helper

title: wgfreitas/lst
summary: Security log triage CLI — deterministic detection + LLM explanations in Brazilian Portuguese. Scales to multi-GB logs, LLM used only for the explanation layer.

title: Porch1i/aec-rag-system
summary: 🏗️ Build a robust RAG system for AEC design management, leveraging GraphRAG and local LLMs for efficient data retrieval and enhanced project insights.

title: hamudoficcial/cli-prompts
summary: ✨ Build modern CLI applications with easy-to-use, beautiful components that enhance user interaction, free from dependencies and fully tested.
